sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka vai khempeuh Nangma khut sungah
Om cih thei ing Nang deih bang in
Na omna sungah damtak Nong kai a
Na Kha Siangtho tawh lam Nong lak a

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Siangtho sapna sung Nong tawn sak a
Kei Nong teel hi Nang kiangah hong kai in
Hong puah pha'n Topa kong ngen hi
Hong seek hong bawel hong zang hong dim
Beel seekpa khut sung kong ki-ap hi
Hong sam hong lak hong leh hong tonpih in
Beel seekpa khut sung kong ki-ap hi
